citation_and_locator: Yu, Zhiyin and Xiaoshi Hu. 2025. The Syntax of the Sentence-final Particle gaa3 in Cantonese. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 104(2):653–678. DOI 10.29499/CrCL.202507_104(2).0022; official CUHK journal PDF
what_it_supports: Five contexts (plain statement, simple information question, exclamation, warning, quick-answer-demanding question); three proposed syntactic profiles; exact positive and negative co-occurrence judgments; question-type compatibility; addressee-response distinctions; stated vowel-length contrasts; unified cartographic analysis.
limit: Formal analysis and author judgments do not supply corpus frequency, speaker sample, acoustic measurements, variation rates, orthographic distribution, or a complete empirically validated particle-cluster grammar.
